property.name: java.library.path
property.value:
C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-21 in;C:\Windows\Sun\Java in;C:\Windows\system32;C:\Windows;c:\Users\Equipo 01\AppData\Roaming\Code\User\globalStorage\github.copilot-chat\debugCommand;c:\Users\Equipo 01\AppData\Roaming\Code\User\globalStorage\github.copilot-chat\copilotCli;C:\Users\Equipo 01\AppData\Local\Programs\Microsoft VS Code;C:\Program Files\Common Files\Oracle\Java\javapath;C:\Program Files\Eclipse Adoptium\jdk-25.0.2.10-hotspot in;C:\Windows\system32;C:\Windows;C:\Windows\System32\Wbem;C:\Windows\System32\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0\;C:\Windows\System32\OpenSSH\;C:\Program Files\Git\cmd;C:\Program Files
odejs\;C:\Users\Equipo 01\Documents\maven\apache-maven-3.9.12 in;C:\Program Files\PostgreSQL\18 in;C:\Users\Equipo 01\AppData\Local\Microsoft\WindowsApps;C:\Users\Equipo 01\AppData\Local\Programs\Microsoft VS Code in;C:\Users\Equipo 01\AppData\Roaming
pm;C:\Users\Equipo 01\AppData\Local\Programs\Antigravity in;C:\Users\Equipo 01\AppData\Local\Python in;c:\Users\Equipo 01\.vscode\extensions\vscjava.vscode-java-debug-0.58.5 undled\scripts
oConfigScripts;.

testcase.name: [1:7] GET all products returns status 200
testcase.system-out:
09:59:14.610 [main] DEBUG com.intuit.karate.Suite - [config] classpath:karate-config.js 09:59:19.057 [main] INFO com.intuit.karate - karate.env system property was: null 09:59:20.203 [main] DEBUG com.intuit.karate - request: 1 > GET https://automationexercise.com/api/productsList 1 > Host: automationexercise.com 1 > Connection: Keep-Alive 1 > User-Agent: Apache-HttpClient/4.5.14 (Java/21.0.9) 1 > Accept-Encoding: gzip,deflate

chunked 1 < Connection: keep-alive 1 < vary: Accept,Cookie,Accept-Encoding 1 < referrer-policy: same-origin 1 < x-frame-options: DENY 1 < x-content-type-options: nosniff 1 < allow: PUT, OPTIONS, DELETE, POST, GET 1 < x-powered-by: Phusion Passenger(R) 6.1.2 1 < status: 200 OK 1 < Report-To: cfEdge;dur=7,cfOrigin;dur=372 1 < CF-RAY: 9e712d48cb9adaf9-MIA 1 < alt-svc: h3=":443"; ma=86400 {"responseCode": 200, "products": [{"id": 1, "name": "Blue Top", "price": "Rs. 500", "brand": "Polo", "category": {"usertype": {"usertype": "Women"}, "category": "Tops"}}, {"id": 2, "name": "Men Tshirt", "price": "Rs. 400", "brand": "H&M", "category": {"usertype": {"usertype": "Men"}, "category": "category": "Tops"}}, {"id": 7, "name": "Madame Top For Women", "price": "Rs. 1000", "brand": "Madame", "category": {"usertype": {"usertype": "Women"}, "category": "Tops"}}, {"id": 8, "name": "Fancy "category": "Tops & Shirts"}}, {"id": 15, "name": "Printed Off Shoulder Top - White", "price": "Rs. 315", "brand": "Babyhug", "category": {"usertype": {"usertype": "Kids"}, "category": "Tops & Shirts"}}, {"id": 16, "name": "Sleeves Top and Short - Blue & Pink", "price": "Rs. 478", "brand": "Babyhug", "category": {"usertype": {"usertype": "Kids"}, "category": "Dress"}}, {"id": 18, "name": "Rs. 1190", "brand": "Kookie Kids", "category": {"usertype": {"usertype": "Kids"}, "category": "Dress"}}, {"id": 21, "name": "Blue Cotton Indie Mickey Dress", "price": "Rs. 1530", "brand": "Biba", {"usertype": "Kids"}, "category": "Dress"}}, {"id": 23, "name": "Sleeveless Unicorn Print Fit & Flare Net Dress - Multi", "price": "Rs. 1100", "brand": "Biba", "category": {"usertype": {"usertype": "Kids"}, "category": "Dress"}}, {"id": 24, "name": "Colour Blocked Shirt \u2013 Sky Blue", "price": "Rs. 849", "brand": "Allen Solly Junior", "category": {"usertype": {"usertype": "Kids"}, "category": "Tops & Shirts"}}, {"id": 28, "name": "Pure Cotton V-Neck T-Shirt", "price": "Rs. 1299", "brand": "H&M", "category": {"usertype": {"usertype": "Men"}, "category": "Tshirts"}}, {"id": 29, "name": {"usertype": {"usertype": "Men"}, "category": "Tshirts"}}, {"id": 33, "name": "Soft Stretch Jeans", "price": "Rs. 799", "brand": "Polo", "category": {"usertype": {"usertype": "Men"}, "category": "Jeans"}}, {"id": 35, "name": "Regular Fit Straight Jeans", "price": "Rs. 1200", "brand": "H&M", "category": {"usertype": {"usertype": "Men"}, "category": "Jeans"}}, {"id": 37, "name": "Grunt Blue Slim Fit Jeans", "price": "Rs. 1400", "brand": "Polo", "category": {"usertype": {"usertype": "Men"}, "category": "Jeans"}}, {"id": 38, "name": "Rose Pink Embroidered Maxi Dress", "price": "Rs. 2300", "brand": "Madame", "category": {"usertype": {"usertype": "Women"}, "category": "Dress"}}, {"id": 39, "name": "Cotton Silk Hand Block Print Saree", "price": "Rs. 3000", "brand": "Biba", "category": {"usertype": {"usertype": "Women"}, "category": "Saree"}}, {"id": 40, "name": "Rust Red Linen Saree", "price": "Rs. 3500", "brand": "Biba", "category": {"usertype": {"usertype": "Women"}, "category": "Saree"}}, {"id": 41, "name": "Beautiful Peacock Blue Cotton Linen Saree", "price": "Rs. 5000", "brand": "Madame", "category": {"usertype": {"usertype": "Women"}, "category": "Saree"}}, {"id": 42, "name": "Lace Top For Women", "price": "Rs. 1400", "brand": "Mast & Harbour", "category": {"usertype": {"usertype": "Women"}, "category": "Tops"}}, {"id": 43, "name": "GRAPHIC DESIGN MEN T SHIRT - BLUE", "price": "Rs. 1389", "brand": "Mast & Harbour", "category": {"usertype": {"usertype": "Men"}, "category": "Tshirts"}}]}

testcase.name: [2:12] Response body contains responseCode 200 and a non-empty products list

failure.message: class java.util.LinkedHashMap cannot be cast to class java.lang.String (java.util.LinkedHashMap and java.lang.String are in module java.base of loader 'bootstrap') classpath:examples/products/products.feature:17

testcase.failure: org.opentest4j.AssertionFailedError: class java.util.LinkedHashMap cannot be cast to class java.lang.String (java.util.LinkedHashMap and java.lang.String are in module java.base of loader 'bootstrap') classpath:examples/products/products.feature:17 at com.intuit.karate.junit5.FeatureNode.lambda$next$1(FeatureNode.java:86) at java.base/java.util.stream.ForEachOps$ForEachOp$OfRef.accept(ForEachOps.java:184) at java.base/java.util.stream.ReferencePipeline$3$1.accept(ReferencePipeline.java:197) at java.base/java.util.stream.ReferencePipeline$2$1.accept(ReferencePipeline.java:179) at java.base/java.util.stream.ReferencePipeline$3$1.accept(ReferencePipeline.java:197) at java.base/java.util.Iterator.forEachRemaining(Iterator.java:133) at java.base/java.util.Spliterators$IteratorSpliterator.forEachRemaining(Spliterators.java:1939) at java.base/java.util.stream.AbstractPipeline.copyInto(AbstractPipeline.java:509) at java.base/java.util.stream.AbstractPipeline.wrapAndCopyInto(AbstractPipeline.java:499) at java.base/java.util.stream.ForEachOps$ForEachOp.evaluateSequential(ForEachOps.java:151) at java.base/java.util.stream.ForEachOps$ForEachOp$OfRef.evaluateSequential(ForEachOps.java:174) at java.base/java.util.stream.AbstractPipeline.evaluate(AbstractPipeline.java:234) at java.base/java.util.stream.ReferencePipeline.forEachOrdered(ReferencePipeline.java:601) at java.base/java.util.Optional.ifPresent(Optional.java:178) at java.base/java.util.ArrayList.forEach(ArrayList.java:1596) at java.base/java.util.ArrayList.forEach(ArrayList.java:1596)

testcase.name: [3:19] Each product has the required fields with correct types
